reason_for_classification: This video is an EndoSim colonoscopy simulator tutorial/instructional content. It shows navigation through a virtual colon with step-by-step guidance (Insert colonoscope at various distances, Examine the colon, Find and examine targets, Press buttons when finished). This is not an FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task. FLS tasks involve peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop placement, extracorporeal suturing, or intracorporeal suturing on bench-top trainers. Colonoscopy is an endoscopic procedure unrelated to FLS certification.
content_type: Educational simulator tutorial with narrated instructions and task overlays

frame_analyses.description: EndoSim by Surgical Science title card
Virtual colon view at 135 cm insertion depth with instruction overlay
Colon examination phase with visual targets and red circle indicator
frame_analyses.notes: Guidance to find and examine targets

cannot_score_reasons: This is not an FLS task
It is a colonoscopy simulator tutorial, not a bench-top surgical task
Video contains narrated instructions and UI overlays, confirming instructional classification
No laparoscopic instruments, suture, knots, pegs, gauze, or other FLS equipment present

demonstrated_techniques: Colonoscope insertion and navigation through virtual colon
Target identification and examination in endoscopic field
teaching_content.context: Procedural training on EndoSim virtual reality platform for colonoscopy technique, not FLS
